name: minimal_ios2k8padding
description: iOS 極簡風格，採用 San Francisco 系統字體、圓角卡片設計、柔和陰影。適合 Apple 生態系統應用展示。 (padding scaled by floor(original/8))

styles.body: margin: 0; padding: 2px 2px; background-color: #f2f2f7; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'SF Pro Text', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
styles..container: max-width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); overflow: hidden;
styles..title: color: #000000; padding: 2px 2px; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; text-align: center; letter-spacing: -0.5px; border-bottom: 0.5px solid #e5e5ea;
styles.th: padding: 5px 2px; text-align: center; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #8e8e93; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; border-bottom: 0.5px solid #e5e5ea;
styles.td: padding: 2px 2px; font-size: 17px; color: #000000; border-bottom: 0.5px solid #e5e5ea; text-align: left; line-height: 1.4; font-weight: 400;
styles..footer: background-color: #f9f9fb; color: #8e8e93; padding: 5px 2px; font-size: 13px; text-align: center; border-top: 0.5px solid #e5e5ea;
